content.question: How much of the observed ECtHR and EU infringement-proceeding failure to produce Roma segregation correction is attributable to weak accountability mechanisms and political will versus to insufficient operational detail in the remedy orders, versus to complex-system lock-in that schools cannot unilaterally change without transport/housing/family-enrollment coordination?
content.reduction_path: Conduct implementation-readiness assessment in 3-5 municipalities with persistent segregation patterns documented in ECtHR case files; identify specific operational barriers (transport, catchment area rules, parental preference data) and test whether targeted operational fix (e.g., managed enrollment or transport subsidy) produces measurable segregation reduction before scaling.
